name: Mexican Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground beef and onion in a pan until the meat is browned. Drain any excess fat.
2. Mix together the cream of mushroom soup, cream of chicken soup, enchilada sauce, and taco sauce.
3. In a casserole dish, layer half of the cheese Doritos, followed by the soup/meat mixture, and then half of the grated cheddar cheese.
4. Repeat the layers with the remaining ingredients.
5. Cover the dish and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly.
